enabled.title: Enable Discord Chat Archive
enabled.description: Disabled by default. Complete the Discord and Streamer.bot setup first.

ignoreBots.title: Ignore detected bot accounts
ignoreBots.description: Uses StreamBridge's normalized human, bot, and system actor classification.

ignoredUsers.title: Ignored viewers and bots
ignoredUsers.description: One exact value per line: username, platform:username, or platform:id:stable-user-id. Matching is case-insensitive.

ignoreCommands.title: Ignore command messages
ignoreCommands.description: Skips messages beginning with the saved command prefix.

includeSimulatedMessages.title: Allow simulated messages
includeSimulatedMessages.description: Off by default so trigger tests cannot write to the real Discord channel.

webhookDisplayName.title: Discord webhook display name
webhookDisplayName.description: Used for normal batches. The private webhook URL stays in Streamer.bot and is never saved here.

useViewerIdentityForSingleMessage.title: Use viewer name for single-message deliveries
useViewerIdentityForSingleMessage.description: Off by default so Discord clearly identifies the archive bot instead of appearing to impersonate viewers.

useViewerAvatarForSingleMessage.title: Use viewer profile picture for single messages

batchWindowSeconds.title: Collect messages for (seconds)
batchWindowSeconds.description: Five seconds keeps the add-on below StreamBridge's approved-action rate limit while reducing Discord webhook calls.

maximumQueueMessages.title: Maximum messages waiting
maximumQueueMessages.description: When full, the oldest waiting message is omitted and a bounded notice is added to the next post.

maximumMessageCharacters.title: Maximum characters copied from one chat message

retryCount.title: Retry failed Discord posts
retryCount.description: Retries stay in memory only and are discarded when StreamBridge stops.

showDroppedMessageNotice.title: Report messages omitted by a full queue
